items.title: Newcastle urged to name St James’ Park stand after Kevin Keegan as Toon icon hails legend after his death at 75
items.summary: LES FERDINAND has called for Newcastle to pay Kevin Keegan the ultimate tribute by naming a stand after him at St James' Park. The Magpies legend passed away at the age of 75 earlier today, following a battle with cancer. Newcastle icon Alan Shearer and other big names released emotional statements

items.title: Ex-Villa striker Duran joins seventh club aged 22
items.summary: Former Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran joins Benfica on a season-long loan from Saudi Arabian side Al-Nassr.

items.title: Menzies shocks world No 2 Humphries in World Matchplay thriller
items.summary: Cameron Menzies produced a massive upset to defeat 2024 champion Luke Humphries 10-7 at the World Matchplay on Monday night.

items.title: HUGE SHOCK! Humphries OUT after Big Fish finish from Menzies!
